content.en:
Ye Tian didn't know much about the situation in the Tianqu Forbidden Zone, mainly because the Multidimensional Territory Void Heaven Palace didn't know much about it, so he naturally couldn't get more information.

The foundation of the Void Heaven Palace is still a little lower, compared with some ancient ultimate forces, it still belongs to the general kind, although there are three ultimate realm masters, but there are no too powerful nine realms below.

Before he joined the Void Heaven Palace, the Void Heaven Palace didn't even have a ninth realm that had comprehended the ultimate rule.

This is tantamount to a fault!

Therefore, there are naturally no strong people in the Void Heaven Palace to explore the Tianqu Forbidden Zone, and there is naturally very little information to understand~.

......

Ye Tian didn't know if there was a chance in this black sea, but he still explored it first.

He walked through the black sea step by step, looking for possible opportunities.

I don't know how long he walked, but he gradually felt a terrible oppressive force.

"There must be something extraordinary ahead!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He immediately rushed over, and then he saw an amazing stone pillar.

This stone pillar is pure black, and there are countless dense lines on it, it runs through this black sea and dimensional void, and contains an incomparably terrifying aura.

"What kind of pillar is this?"

Ye Tian walked over curiously.

And at this moment, he sensed an existence at the peak of the Nine Realms, and the other party was at the bottom of the stone pillar, located in the depths of the Black Sea.

The Nine Realms peak powerhouse also rushed out directly from the bottom of the Black Sea Stone Pillar.

"Does Your Excellency also want to occupy the Pillar of the Demon Sea?"

The other party was full of murderous intent.

"I'm just here to find an opportunity!" Ye Tian said lightly.

"Fuck off, the fate here is mine!"

The other party attacked angrily.

Seeing this, Ye Tian could only choose to do it.

The Extreme Body of the Abyss Star and the Ultimate Body of the Extradimensional Realm were urged one after another, and the two ultimate rules were all exerted.

Thundered!!!!

The two sides broke out with an ultimate-dimensional killing move, killing each other on this black sea.

"Spear of the Abyss!"

Ye Tian's abyssal spear blessed by the Abyssal Star Ultimate Rule pierced through the opponent's ultimate body, and the opponent's ultimate dimensional killing move also bombarded Ye Tian's body, but it was blocked by the Abyssal Star Ultimate Body.

However.

Just when Ye Tian thought that he had severely injured the other party, the injury of this Nine Realms peak recovered quickly, and there was nothing wrong at all.

This is not an ordinary injury, but an injury caused by the ultimate dimensional killing move, and the other party can still recover, which is too abnormal.

"No, it's the other party's ultimate system problem!"

Ye Tian noticed it.

The opponent's ultimate system should have something to do with this black sea or the pillar of the demon sea, and the ultimate body of this ultimate system has average physical strength, good attack power, and extremely terrifying recovery ability.

Thundered!!!

Ye Tian kept attacking the other party, piercing the opponent's body again and again, shattering or even breaking it into a blood mist, but the other party could easily recover.

In other words, with Ye Tian's current strength, he couldn't kill the other party at all.

And the other party also understood that he couldn't hurt Ye Tian with his own strength, Ye Tian had two ultimate bodies, two ultimate rules, among which the flesh of the Yuanxing Ultimate Body was too powerful to break Ye Tian's defense.

So, they stopped at the same time.

"Your Excellency has cultivated two ultimate bodies, two ultimate rules, presumably you shouldn't have come here to cultivate the Demon Sea Ultimate System, right?" the Nine Realms peak powerhouse asked.

"The Demon Sea Ultimate System? Naturally not, I just entered the Tianqu Forbidden Zone, and I entered here. I don't know anything about the Demon Sea Ultimate System, so naturally I'm not interested!" Ye Tian confessed.

"Then I'm sorry!" the other party apologized: "Over the past countless years, there have been many peaks of the Nine Realms that have coveted the Demon Sea Ultimate System, and I specialize in cultivating the Demon Sea Ultimate System, so naturally I don't want other powerhouses to compete with me for the Ultimate Realm Master of the Demon Sea Ultimate System." Therefore, for the peak of the Nine Realms that came here, they would choose to forcibly drive them away. "

"It's okay, since it's a misunderstanding, then forget it!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

Subsequently, talking to the other party, Ye Tian knew the name of the other party.

Mastiff came here countless years ago, and has been studying the Demon Sea Ultimate System, and now he has perfected the Demon Sea Ultimate System, the Demon Sea Ultimate Body has been completed, and the Demon Sea Ultimate Rules have been comprehended to the triple realm.

Above the Ultimate Rule Realm, the other party is above Ye Tian.

It's just that the ultimate body of the Demon Sea doesn't have an advantage in strength and defense, only the recovery ability is terrifying, and it can be called a real immortal body at the peak of the Nine Realms.

And the Mastiff Monarch took a fancy to this immortal body, unless it was the most demonic and terrifying existence at the peak of the Nine Realms, he had no hope of killing him.

It can be said that Mastiff Jun has completely given up everything in the outside world, and has been studying hard here to understand the ultimate rules of the Demon Sea, and has never ventured.

After all, leaving here to explore the Tianqu Forbidden Zone, it is easy to encounter danger, and even his immortal body may not be able to survive when the time comes, and if he is trapped somewhere and can't get out, wouldn't it be bad?

Therefore, he chose to stabilize here to comprehend, even if the comprehension was slower, but one day he would comprehend the ultimate rules of the Demon Sea to an extremely high realm, cultivate the ultimate body of the Demon Sea to the perfection realm, and then impact the main realm of the ultimate realm.

"Mastiff King, since this is the case, I will leave this Demon Sea, and I will not delay your comprehension of the ultimate rules of the Demon Sea!"

Ye Tian said goodbye.

Mastiff Jun reminded: "Ye Tian, the Demon Sea is very big, you can leave from this direction, other directions are dangerous, and if you leave from this place, you can enter the Island of Demon Whiskers." There are a lot of good things on the Isle of Demon's Whiskers, but they are more dangerous. My combat strength was a little worse, I went once, I almost got stuck, and I never went again. Your attack and defense are very strong, and you may gain something. "

"Thank you, Brother Mastiff, for reminding me!"

After Ye Tian said goodbye, he went straight to the Island of Demon Whiskers.

......

Ye Tian kept shuttling, and it didn't take long for him to leave the Demon Sea, and then he arrived at the Island of the Demon Whisker.

The Isle of Whiskers is huge, and the oppressive power here is terrifying, and it is shrouded in a black curtain of light.

You must pass through a black curtain of light to enter Whisker Island.

Wow!

Ye Tian penetrated it and arrived at the interior of the Devil's Whisker Island.

"The suppression power is dozens of times more terrifying than the Demon Sea, and even I have a hard time shuttling here. Ye Tian muttered.

Soon.

An ultimate creature suddenly attacked, and the speed was extremely fast, so that Ye Tiandu almost couldn't react and beg.
